title: Ennai Kollathey Lyrics Geethaiyin Radhai
stanzas: <div>Ennai Kollathey Song Lyrics Geethaiyin Radhai

Ennai kollathe
thalli poogaathe
nenjai killaathe
Kanmani..

Sonna en sollil
illai unmaigal
yeno kobangal
Solladi..

Unnai theendaamal
unnai paarkaamal
Konji peesamal
kannil thookkamillai

Ennul nilee vanthaal
nenjil vaazhginraai
Vittu chellaathe
ithu niyaayamillai..

Kannal moodi kondaalum
unnai kanden.
Meendum yaenintha yaekkam.

Vellai mega thundukkul
Ezhum minnal pol
Enthan vaazhvengum minnaal..

En ithazh melindru
vaazhum maunangal
En manam pesuthe
nooru ennangal

Sonna sollin arthanggal
ennul vaazhuthe
Thooram thalli chendraalum
uyir theeduthe..

Asai vaarthai ellame
indru kiiralaai
Enthan nenjin oorathil
paaya seigiraai..

Ennul nil vanthaai
innum vaazhginraai
Unthan sollaale
thooram undaakkinaai

Ennai theendaathe
ennai paarkaathe
Onrum pesaathe
pothum thunbangal..

Ennai vittu sellaathe
enthan anbe
Vendum un kaathal
ondrey.

Unnai mattum nesithen
ithu unmai
Innum yaenintha oodal..

En uyirkaathalai
unthan kaathoram
Orumuraiyaavathu solla
nee vendum

Enthan aasai muthangal
unnai serumo
Illai kaathal yuthangal
innum neelumo..

Unthan kannil nee sindhum
eeram yenadi
Nenjin baaram veendaame
ennai paaradi..

Ennai kollathe
thalli poogaathe
nenjai killaathe
Kanmani..

Sonna en sollil
illai unmaigal
yeno kobangal
Solladi..

seo.title: Ennai Kollathey Lyrics Geethaiyin Radhai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ennai Kollathey'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the struggles of a heart caught in affection.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Geethaiyin Radhai, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional turmoil and romantic aspirations.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features vocals by Keshvini Saravanan and Kumaresh, with music composed by Ztish.

When was 'Ennai Kollathey' released?

The song was released on September 22, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ennai Kollathey', the heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody create a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The song captures the essence of love, portraying the emotional struggles faced by the characters in Geethaiyin Radhai. As the singers convey their feelings, the music complements the narrative beautifully, evoking a sense of nostalgia and longing. This duet is perfect for moments of reflection and connection, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennai Kollathey from Geethaiyin Radhai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Keshvini Saravanan and Kumaresh, this song takes you on an emotional journey. The unique composition by Ztish adds a modern twist to the classic romantic vibe, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Don't push me away, don't hurt my heart, my dear..
There are no truths in what I said, why are there so many anger? Tell me..
Without seeking you, without seeing you, there is no peace in my eyes.
If you come into my heart, you will live there. This is not fair to leave me..
Even if I close my eyes, I see you. Why this longing again?
In the white clouds, like lightning, my life is like a lightning bolt..
The silence that lives above my head, my heart speaks a hundred words.
The meanings of what I said live within me. Even if I push you away, it will take my life..
All my desires today are like a curse. In my heart, you are making a mess..
You have come into my life and are still living. Your words have created distance.
Don't seek me, don't look at me. Just being silent is enough for the troubles..
Don't leave me, my love. I need only your love.
I loved only you, this is the truth. Why this quarrel again?
Your love is the reason for my life. You must say it just once.
Will my desires unite with you? Or will love still remain distant?
In your eyes, the tears flow, why is that? Don't let my heart break, look at me..
Don't push me away, don't hurt my heart, my dear..
There are no truths in what I said, why are there so many anger? Tell me..
